attributes.action: Introduce a legal requirement to clearly list ALL ingredients in products
attributes.additional_details:
So much focus is on the "top 14" allergens, yet thousands have life threatening allergies too things outside of those. Are they deemed less important?
For many, their allergen is hidden under generic terms such as "flavouring",  "colouring", a letter/number. Non generic terms are also used. 
When you contact manufacturers, they can choose not to state if a product contains a particular item. 
All allergy suffers want is to know exactly what is in a product. Is that really to much to ask?
attributes.background: Too protect people from serious allergic reactions, the government needs too make it a legal requirement to clearly list every ingredient in products. Any product that can be eaten or used for personal hygiene, clothes and kitchen utensil washing needs clear labeling

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756883
